allowed_claim: M8e proves the M8c worker/session seam can also pass guarded graph-edge binding and object-vector smoke gates for the M8 selected pack while preserving a bounded selected no-mutation advantage.
forbidden_claim: M8e does not prove default GPU mode, unguarded graph mutation, object-vector substitution, full non-key raw-overlap field parity, or whole-Flye speedup.

audit.error: CUDA full-query-hit worker session request failed: required bytes exceed memory budget

checks.detail: CUFLYE_READ_TO_GRAPH_FULL_QUERY_HIT_GRAPH_EDGE_BINDING_MODE=graph-edge-binding-dry-run-v0
checks.name: explicit_graph_edge_binding_mode

checks.detail: M6p raw-overlap rehydration must pass before graph-edge binding
checks.name: rehydration_passed

checks.detail: M6q shadow ledger must pass before graph-edge binding
checks.name: shadow_ledger_passed

checks.detail: graph-edge binding requires chain-input-positive rows
checks.name: chain_input_rows_present

checks.detail: validated worker raw-overlap TSV must be readable
checks.name: worker_output_readable

checks.detail: graph-edge binding audit JSON path must be available
checks.name: audit_metadata_available

checks.detail: worker output must not have reached graph mutation
checks.name: graph_not_mutated

checks.detail: binding rows must match M6q chain-input-positive rows
checks.name: binding_count_matches_chain_input

checks.detail: every binding row must have a resolved nonzero edge_id
checks.name: binding_rows_have_resolved_edge_ids

checks.detail: every binding row edge_id must map to a live GraphEdge
checks.name: binding_rows_have_live_graph_edges

checks.detail: graph-edge binding audit must not mutate graph state
checks.name: graph_not_mutated_after_binding

checks.detail: CUFLYE_READ_TO_GRAPH_FULL_QUERY_HIT_OBJECT_VECTOR_SMOKE_MODE=object-vector-smoke-v0

checks.name: worker_output_readable

checks.name: audit_metadata_available

checks.detail: worker output must not have reached graph mutation
checks.name: graph_not_mutated

checks.detail: constructed object count must match M6s binding rows
checks.name: constructed_objects_match_binding_rows

checks.detail: every constructed object must have a live GraphEdge
checks.name: constructed_objects_have_live_graph_edges

checks.detail: accounting must cover every constructed object
checks.name: accounting_rows_match_constructed_objects

checks.detail: query accounting rows must sum to constructed objects
checks.name: query_accounting_covers_objects

checks.detail: edge accounting rows must sum to constructed objects
checks.name: edge_accounting_covers_objects

checks.detail: query-edge accounting rows must sum to constructed objects
checks.name: query_edge_accounting_covers_objects

checks.detail: object-vector smoke must not mutate graph state
checks.name: graph_not_mutated_after_object_vector

object_vector_smoke.error: object-vector smoke accounting differs from bound rows

checks.detail: CUFLYE_READ_TO_GRAPH_FULL_QUERY_HIT_REHYDRATION_MODE=raw-overlap-vector-dry-run-v0
checks.name: explicit_rehydration_mode

checks.name: worker_output_readable

checks.name: graph_not_mutated

checks.name: typed_row_keys_match_worker

checks.detail: CUFLYE_READ_TO_GRAPH_FULL_QUERY_HIT_SHADOW_LEDGER_MODE=raw-overlap-chain-input-shadow-v0

checks.name: worker_output_readable

checks.name: audit_metadata_available

checks.name: graph_not_mutated

checks.detail: ledger row count must match M6p rehydrated record count
checks.name: ledger_count_matches_rehydration

checks.name: edge_id_rows_accounted

checks.name: graph_edge_consumption_candidates_blocked

checks.detail: ledger evaluation must not mutate graph state
checks.name: graph_not_mutated_after_ledger

next_recommended_step: M8f: turn the selected object-vector smoke result into a tighter non-mutating graph-facing handoff contract, still guarded by the same source-pack, row-key, rehydration, ledger, binding, and object gates.
plain_language_benefit: M8e shows the selected CUDA path can build and validate live GraphEdge-bound object-vector smoke rows without erasing the selected advantage: warm no-mutation seam total averages 66.499267 ms versus the matched CPU quick-overlap baseline 79.294112 ms, or 1.192x faster.
